summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered Buffer ETF (BUFR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds, which holds a laddered portfolio of 12 FT Vest U.S. Equity Buffer ETFs. BUFR was launched on Aug 10, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Buffered ETFs Offer Protection on Ugly Market Days. But the Cost Can Be Steep.
data.text: Funds that cap losses are growing in popularity. But these buffered, or defined outcome, funds also miss out on big market gains.

data.title: First Trust Launches New Laddered Portfolio of Buffer ETFs (“BUFR”) on Cboe Canada
data.text: TORONTO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $BUFR #Cboe--Cboe Canada is pleased to welcome back return issuer, First Trust with the launch of the First Trust Cboe Vest Fund of Buffer ETFs (Canada) ETF.
